title: How to Be an Adult in Relationships
author: David Richo
subline: The five A's: Attention, Acceptance, Appreciation, Affection, Allowing.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A hand drawing a heart with one finger, finger tracing a path. The heart is RED. Five short red lines on the path (the 5 A's). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- Heart path traced as a single closed Bezier curve -->
    <path d="M 0 100 Q -200 0 -200 -100 Q -200 -200 -100 -200 Q 0 -200 0 -120 Q 0 -200 100 -200 Q 200 -200 200 -100 Q 200 0 0 100 Z"
          fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- Five tick marks along the heart, each labeled with an A -->
    <g font-size="22" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.04em">
      <circle cx="-150" cy="-180" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <text x="-150" y="-220" text-anchor="middle">1 · ATTENTION</text>
      <circle cx="150" cy="-180" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <text x="150" y="-220" text-anchor="middle">2 · ACCEPTANCE</text>
      <circle cx="200" cy="-60" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <text x="240" y="-50" text-anchor="start">3 · APPRECIATION</text>
      <circle cx="-200" cy="-60" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <text x="-240" y="-50" text-anchor="end">4 · AFFECTION</text>
      <circle cx="0" cy="80" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <text x="0" y="160" text-anchor="middle">5 · ALLOWING</text>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A heart drawn as a single red path, with 5 numbered ticks along the curve for the 5 A's. The heart is RED. 180px whisper title at the top — modest because the heart IS the cover.
